news.title:
NSE Nifty 50 dropped 1.96% to 24,825.45, marking its worst Budget day since 2020; Sensex fell 0.36% to 80,722.94.
Hero MotoCorp sales rose 26% YoY in Jan. Quess Corp faces Rs. 160 crore tax demand; Oxyzo Credit Fund I gets Tourism Finance Corp support.
news.summary:
NSE Nifty 50 dropped 1.96% to 24,825.45, marking its worst Budget day since 2020; Sensex fell 0.36% to 80,722.94.
Hero MotoCorp sales rose 26% YoY in Jan. Quess Corp faces Rs. 160 crore tax demand; Oxyzo Credit Fund I gets Tourism Finance Corp support.

news.title:
Quess Corp's Q3 revenue rose 3% QoQ to ₹3,930 cr; EBITDA grew 28% YoY to ₹80 cr.
Adjusted PAT increased 29% YoY to ₹62 cr; interim dividend declared at ₹5/share.
news.summary:
Quess Corp's Q3 revenue rose 3% QoQ to ₹3,930 cr; EBITDA grew 28% YoY to ₹80 cr.
Adjusted PAT increased 29% YoY to ₹62 cr; interim dividend declared at ₹5/share.

news.title:
Quess Corp declares Rs. 5 interim dividend/share for FY 2025-26, with Feb 6, 2026, as the record date.
The company reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2025, alongside a qualified audit report on tax deductions.
news.summary:
Quess Corp declares Rs. 5 interim dividend/share for FY 2025-26, with Feb 6, 2026, as the record date.
The company reported unaudited financial results for Q3 FY2025, alongside a qualified audit report on tax deductions.

news.title:
Quess Corp announces board meeting on Jan 28, 2026, to review Q3 FY25-26 results and declare interim dividend.
Trading window for Quess Corp securities closed from Jan 1 to Jan 30, reopening on Jan 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Quess Corp announces board meeting on Jan 28, 2026, to review Q3 FY25-26 results and declare interim dividend.
Trading window for Quess Corp securities closed from Jan 1 to Jan 30, reopening on Jan 31, 2026.

news.title:
Quess Corp faces a tax dispute for FY 2021-22, with DRP issuing adjustments on Dec 23, 2025.
The company plans to appeal the final tax order and reassess financial impact post-DCIT order.
news.summary:
Quess Corp faces a tax dispute for FY 2021-22, with DRP issuing adjustments on Dec 23, 2025.
The company plans to appeal the final tax order and reassess financial impact post-DCIT order.

news.title:
Quess Corp promotes Lohit Bhatia to CEO from Jan 1, 2026.
Neeraj Jain becomes CFO from Dec 5, 2025; leadership roles updated.
news.summary:
Quess Corp promotes Lohit Bhatia to CEO from Jan 1, 2026.
Neeraj Jain becomes CFO from Dec 5, 2025; leadership roles updated.

news.title:
Quess Corp designates key personnel to assess info materiality as per SEBI norms.
Executive Director, CEO, CFO listed with contacts; info shared on company website.
news.summary:
Quess Corp designates key personnel to assess info materiality as per SEBI norms.
Executive Director, CEO, CFO listed with contacts; info shared on company website.

news.title:
Quess Corp fined Rs. 4,000 + Rs. 720 GST for SEBI regulation non-compliance.
Issue due to fractional rounding, term end; rectified Nov 6, 2025, waiver applied.
news.summary:
Quess Corp fined Rs. 4,000 + Rs. 720 GST for SEBI regulation non-compliance.
Issue due to fractional rounding, term end; rectified Nov 6, 2025, waiver applied.

news.title:
Quess Corp Ltd's subsidiary, Quesscorp Holdings Pte. Ltd., forms Quess Engineering Pte. Ltd. in Singapore.
The new entity focuses on Overseas Staffing Business in Engineering Services; 100% shareholding by Quesscorp Holdings.
news.summary:
Quess Corp Ltd's subsidiary, Quesscorp Holdings Pte. Ltd., forms Quess Engineering Pte. Ltd. in Singapore.
The new entity focuses on Overseas Staffing Business in Engineering Services; 100% shareholding by Quesscorp Holdings.

news.title:
Quess Corp reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 3,832 crores, up 3% YoY, highest quarterly EBITDA of INR 77 crores (+11% YoY), and PAT of INR 52 crores.
General Staffing grew 3% YoY with 21,283 net additions, while Professional Staffing delivered 11% revenue growth and a record EBITDA margin of 12.2%.
news.summary:
Quess Corp reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 3,832 crores, up 3% YoY, highest quarterly EBITDA of INR 77 crores (+11% YoY), and PAT of INR 52 crores.
General Staffing grew 3% YoY with 21,283 net additions, while Professional Staffing delivered 11% revenue growth and a record EBITDA margin of 12.2%.

news.title:
Quess Corp plans strategic split into three verticals for HR tech-led growth.
Focus areas include automation, digital staffing, and overseas markets post-demerger.
news.summary:
Quess Corp plans strategic split into three verticals for HR tech-led growth.
Focus areas include automation, digital staffing, and overseas markets post-demerger.

news.title:
Quess Corp forecasts steady double-digit EBITDA margin in professional staffing.
This reflects strong sector performance for Quess Corp Limited.
news.summary:
Quess Corp forecasts steady double-digit EBITDA margin in professional staffing.
This reflects strong sector performance for Quess Corp Limited.

news.title:
Quess Corp becomes India's largest domestic staffing player with 483,115 headcount.
Q2 FY26 revenue rose 3% YoY to ₹3,832 Cr; PAT at ₹52 Cr, EPS ₹3.5.
news.summary:
Quess Corp becomes India's largest domestic staffing player with 483,115 headcount.
Q2 FY26 revenue rose 3% YoY to ₹3,832 Cr; PAT at ₹52 Cr, EPS ₹3.5.

news.title:
Quess Corp granted 17,091 RSUs to employees, each convertible to 1 equity share.
Paid-up capital rose from 14.9M to 14.91M shares after allotment of 81,680 equity shares.
news.summary:
Quess Corp granted 17,091 RSUs to employees, each convertible to 1 equity share.
Paid-up capital rose from 14.9M to 14.91M shares after allotment of 81,680 equity shares.

news.title:
Quess Corp's Q2 EBITDA rose to ₹768M, up from ₹693M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 2% from 1.87% YoY.
news.summary:
Quess Corp's Q2 EBITDA rose to ₹768M, up from ₹693M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 2% from 1.87% YoY.

news.title:
Quess Corp schedules a board meeting on Oct 29, 2025, to review unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ending Sep 30, 2025.
Trading window for Quess Corp is closed from Oct 1 to Oct 31, reopening on Nov 1, 2025.
news.summary:
Quess Corp schedules a board meeting on Oct 29, 2025, to review unaudited financial results for Q2 and H1 ending Sep 30, 2025.
Trading window for Quess Corp is closed from Oct 1 to Oct 31, reopening on Nov 1, 2025.
